expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度] 是总体尺寸, [板厚] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度, [背板厚度] 是背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดบอร์ดสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือการวัดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุของบอร์ดด้านบน, ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước tấm ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của ván trên, ván dưới và ván bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của ván sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa itaas, ibaba at gilid na mga board, at ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa likurang board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ဘီထောင်အတွက် သစ်သားအရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ပြီး [BoardThick] သည် အပေါ်ဘက်၊ အောက်ဘက်နှင့် ဘက်ဘော်အားသားအထူဖြစ်ကာ၊ [BackBoardThick] သည် အနောက်ဘက်ဘော်အားသားအထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាទំហំក្តារសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជារង្វាស់សរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈក្តារខាងលើ, ខាងក្រោម និងខាងចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈក្តារខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດບອດສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນການວັດທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງວັດສະດຸບອດເທິງ, ລຸ່ມ ແລະຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງວັດສະດຸບອດດ້ານຫາງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板のサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は全体の寸法で、[BoardThick]は上部、下部、側部の板材の厚さ、[BackBoardThick]は背面板材の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 측정값이며, [BoardThick]는 상, 하, 측면 보드 재료의 두께이고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재료의 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero trasero. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] est la mesure totale, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieures, inférieures et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwand. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कक्ष के लिए बोर्ड आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковой досок, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала для задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
